Peter, This week, for the first time this election cycle, we received the results of a poll of TX-10 voters. And it's looking good! **524 respondents were asked, if the election was held today, who would you vote for? 39% said Republican Michael McCaul; 36% said they would vote for me; and 22% said they are undecided. ** This is great news! Despite all the prevailaing wisdom that TX-10 is a "safe" Republican seat, this is a District in play. And we have a path to victory! [**Help us keep the momentum. Donate $20 or more today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1926787/10092393/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGY2YWQ3My0xOWEyLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Duj0NYOekjJaRI1_Y9VKqHt5eOlmZfZ757wNjShGxVs=) **We also asked voters to rank the issues they care about, and healthcare is #1. **Democrats and Republicans, young voters and seniors, rural and urban voters – everyone agrees. Healthcare is the most important issue in this election. **I am committed to providing comprehensive healthcare to every American**, regardless of pre-existing conditions. I support Medicare for All and similar universal healthcare programs. McCaul voted last year to cut healthcare from tens of millions of Americans. **My campaign is fighting for what the vast majority of voters want.** Now, our work is in front of us. **We know the messages that resonate; now we need to reach the people.** Our growing staff has an ambitious plan to reach over 100,000 households over the next ten weeks. We need you to pitch in to make this happen. **When I win, you will have a Democratic majority in Congress that can protect the safety net and restore common decency to our government. ** [**Donate $20 or more today to help us share these essential messages with voters across TX-10.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1926788/10092394/-2058851995?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGY2YWQ3My0xOWEyLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Duj0NYOekjJaRI1_Y9VKqHt5eOlmZfZ757wNjShGxVs=) Momentum is building! Onward,
Mike

The White House • August 17, 2018
## ‘Made in America’—the results so far
##
##
**President Donald J. Trump** ran for office on a simple idea. Too many politicians, especially on the left, insisted that America must adjust to a new age of slow growth and declining influence. Instead, the President innately understood Charles Krauthammer’s words—delivered in 2009—to be true: **“[Decline is a choice](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE3LjkzNzg3NjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNy45Mzc4NzY1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcyMTYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.weeklystandard.com/charles-krauthammer/decline-is-a-choice-270813).” ** **So is American renewal.** Better trade deals open markets for American farmers and protect American workers. Lower taxes on families and employers reinvigorate American businesses. Fewer regulations put more power back into the hands of American citizens and their local governments. **There’s another key ingredient:** “We want to make more products and say ‘Made in America’,” the President says. “‘Made in the USA’ is a global symbol" of excellence. **Now, America is making things again.** Almost 200,000 manufacturing jobs were lost under the previous Administration; more than 400,000 have been added since President Trump was elected. The latest jobs report reveals that 37,000 manufacturing jobs were created last month alone. **Manufacturing wages are expected to rise** at the fastest rate in more than 18 years. Evident in this hiring and wage surge is soaring confidence among American producers. According to the National Association of Manufacturers, 95 percent of manufacturers have a positive outlook on their companies—the highest on record. [**Get the facts: America’s economic resurgence under President Trump**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE3LjkzNzg3NjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNy45Mzc4NzY1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcyMTYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/made-america-businesses-workers-thriving-president-donald-j-trump/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **Watch:[President Trump to steelworkers: “America is OPEN FOR BUSINESS!”](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE3LjkzNzg3NjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNy45Mzc4NzY1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcyMTYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=h8dbt8MAhgc)**
## Aretha Franklin, 1942–2018
##
**As news of the legendary soul singer** Aretha Franklin’s death broke yesterday, President Trump spoke about her legacy at the top of his Cabinet meeting. **“I want to begin today** by expressing my condolences to the family of a person I knew well,” he said. “She’s brought joy to millions of lives, and her extraordinary legacy will thrive and inspire many generations to come. She was given a great gift from God: her voice. And she used it well.” **[Watch the President pay tribute to Aretha Franklin.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE3LjkzNzg3NjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNy45Mzc4NzY1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcyMTYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://twitter.com/WhiteHouse/status/1030165019088965632) **
# ‘Obamacare forgot about you. But Trump didn’t.’
**“For all the discussion of Obamacare** since its passage, it is too rarely known that the law effectively split the United States’ individual insurance market in two,” Health and Human Services (HHS) Secretary Alex Azar wrote this week. On one side are those with subsidies; on the other are Americans who must bear the full cost of their coverage. **“In other words,** Obamacare has forced unsubsidized Americans to choose between unaffordable insurance and no insurance at all,” the Secretary continued. **The Trump Administration is providing relief** for millions of Americans burdened with Obamacare’s rising premiums. Recently, HHS expanded an affordable insurance option to give customers more choice, allowing them to buy short-term, limited-duration insurance for up to a year. **[Secretary Azar: Obamacare forgot about you. But Trump didn’t.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODE3LjkzNzg3NjUxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgxNy45Mzc4NzY1MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzcyMTYwJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/obamacare-forgot-trump-didnt/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**

name: Jason Yates
subject: SCOTUS WATCH #3 [BREAKING NEWS]
body:
| | Critical Supreme Court Updates from a Faith Perspective
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fscotuswatch%2Fthird-edition%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180817com01&n=1)
| BREAKING NEWS: Senate Democrats have threatened to sue that National Archives if they do not respond to their Freedom of Information Act request within the next 20 working days. The request is to obtain documents from Brett Kavanaugh’s time working as a White House official in the Bush administration. Senate Judiciary Committee Chairman Charles Grassley announced last week Judge Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings will begin on September 4th. **A few important updates regarding the vetting process of Judge Kavanaugh:**
* Judge Kavanaugh has been busy meeting with Senators on Capitol Hill since his nomination; to date, he has met with 49 Senators.
* The National Archives plan to provide over 900,000 documents related to Judge Kavanaugh’s work to the Senate Judiciary Committee. Over 300,000 documents will be provided by August 20th to the Committee and the remaining 600,000 will be provided in October.
* President Bush’s legal team is giving documents directly to the Judiciary Committee, choosing to bypass the National Archives Judge Kavanaugh previously served in the White House Counsel’s Office, as Staff Secretary to President George W. Bush, and was nominated by President Bush to the U.S. Court of Appeals. Democrats have voiced their frustration over the authority the Bush Team is exercising by selecting which documents are released, while Republicans counter that the necessary documents are being provided to the Senate Judiciary Committee in a much faster time frame than they would be if provided first to the National Archives Agency.
* George W. Bush’s Team has provided over 125,000 documents to the Senate Judiciary Committee and 5,700 have been released to the public.

**The issue of abortion and Roe vs. Wade is central to this Supreme Court appointment. It is highly likely Judge Kavanaugh will receive questions regarding the issue in his confirmation hearings.** In response to a question asked during Kavanaugh’s confirmation hearings for his current position on the U.S. Court of Appeals for the D.C. Circuit, he said Roe v. Wade was the law of the land and the precedent had been set. As a district judge, however, Kavanaugh is required to abide by the legal rulings of the Supreme Court, and therefore, his response was likely given in this context. As a Supreme Court Justice, however, he would be in a position to challenge the precedent that has been established. President Trump campaigned on the promise that he would only appoint pro-life judges. The President was also transparent with the American people by making public a list of 25 individuals from which he planned to select his nominees Trump has taken these nominations seriously, and Kavanaugh’s position aligns with Trump’s campaign promise to nominate pro-life justices. **Kavanaugh’s previous court decisions regarding abortion give us insight as to how he might rule on the Supreme Court.**
* In the case Garza v. Hargan, Judge Kavanaugh voted against the ACLU’s assertion to grant illegal-immigrant minors in U.S. custody the right to “abortion on demand.” He emphasized the government’s “permissible interests in favoring fetal life” and “refraining from facilitating abortion.”
* In the case Priests for Life v. HHS, Judge Kavanaugh voted against allowing the Obama Administration to force religious entities to provide contraceptive and abortifacient coverage to their employees. He argued “when the Government forces someone to take an action contrary to his or her sincere religious belief . . . the Government has substantially burdened the individual’s exercise of religion.”

It will be interesting to watch how Judge Kavanaugh answers questions related to the Sanctity of Life before the Senate Judiciary Committee in September. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180817com01&n=2) P.S. If you have missed previous editions of SCOTUS WATCH, you can catch up by going to [https://myfaithvotes.org/scotuswatch](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2Fscotuswatch&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180817com01&n=3 "SCOTUS WATCH").

By partnering with local churches, pastors, and national faith leaders, My Faith Votes mobilizes and equips Christians to lead the conversation on the place of faith in culture and politics._

Our online grassroots fundraising -- donations that come through emails like this one! -- really is a critical piece of our path to victory in this race. Your enthusiasm really powers this campaign.
| | Peter, Congressional campaigns are big, expensive undertakings, **especially in toss-up races like this one,** so I wanted to give you an update on what we are doing here in VA-07 to make sure we reach the voters necessary to win in November. While Abigail is traveling all around Central Virginia listening to voters and sharing her vision for our community, I'm working with the rest of our team to remain laser-focused on executing a winning campaign. We have ads up on TV, we're expanding our team, we're getting ready to order our first mail piece, and we are printing more campaign literature for our canvassers to leave at every door they knock! We are doing everything we can to share Abigail's story with every last voter in the district. name: Tina Smith
subject: ground zero in the midterm elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The latest poll shows this race is within four points.

body:
This week has shown clearly that Governor Kasich’s message is winning, breaking through and matters in Washington and around the country. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2bb447c4beb243558631b14e7105334b&_e=bg7r4P-n94kzfeD2ZnKYNsdOXl_lXpRUc6SCcqcqUQv095jSpdRcs94n5PsDNyVd0o_Ah10On--jwNlXmVyCogCtTGMe586okk6tLUw_t5Uc6NgYubVO7sKZ-uWikVowApQWmoI7LI0kyV8LG9w4w1D6DrH8GVZz6Q-rp1FZoQuYB9CHZuztRKn2r4jDylNfLL0AHIPCwx1NrXKfedLyhpwvQVyGX35vSTui0bJOaBNCHDR9VAHvzy4Ptnaed5VdATuKXWltoKeD7Jnwn8uF-g%3D%3D) | |
---
**To:** Supporters
**From:** John Weaver
**Subject:** Kasich’s Message is Winning
This week has shown clearly that Governor Kasich’s message is winning, breaking through and matters in Washington and around the country.
First there was the special election in Ohio’s 12th Congressional District. It was a Republican district that Republicans have won by huge margins for 20 years. Even in 2016, the Republican [won it with nearly 67% of the vote](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2bb447c4beb243558631b14e7105334b&_e=bg7r4P-n94kzfeD2ZnKYNn5a98fNfYhZpd1IalJZJ18gmWA2PWx-zJl8CfISr6dqyiw7KaFhjkaMWImZDW2ULwXk8Tf_-T3dLKNdOPiMOrGGd2MniAz2jwvOR9ZD5bLHHgzxn-_87P3iB8eHwa-6XELZ8yhlebIz-N4YSBohSZ3YZmFunkX3NhoSc8SdifhikgMByQYjZFI3ZN3V3AhxvWPR7k4uyy1_DVcMszO9wPdEGTZWJSwNX3uAokRh_AhIe7dbLKU3FdqCVY3MsotlMrcw8FC5dL4v0v8BTz4HI1q9zV1eLhTaWTymFou-f2wzHIIRliEpkJNWxuwnIZGu5A%3D%3D).
**The election shouldn’t have been close**. But, because of Donald Trump’s performance in office and his work to divide the country, it was extremely tight. Governor Kasich chose to endorse in the race after the Republican pledged to oppose Trump’s misguided policies on trade and family separation at the border. Every national expert pointed to Governor Kasich’s endorsement as being the key difference maker in the outcome of the race.
**In short, Trump found a way to take a safe Republican seat and make far too competitive - and it took Governor Kasich to save it for Republicans**.
|
---
[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2bb447c4beb243558631b14e7105334b&_e=yrh5ymQNFS2ppwTmYkxaat23VeC2rqSoY-fg4a0sh8vWOXsVAGJOa_O2P1X3scddImA8h_xonKmzuRHUYjOSEao2-jW9STJ7CDEPQjBW_uzEUsrKa-dRcIIoVXiKu2xjO7iEPZR-KOYJOrEKb6Yer0mVuv_ETEwBlqkGh2SJ5E4GssnjLzVCFAoYE939wjtgjJ9WZeS0w_z2Zw6FXdOXk24JxQ9XYqReTBW-aQjJ2ZHM9pBIuEmTOK6Zn5cixDr63DZv-aPpHg2CdnBHAxeNeisJXE1eKLfMb_P2L2rCMbU7P4I2cbHMa7Tl65cZUbuzddqQH6J_wbj0JZsgcXtl-c6or6uIP7bG7QvaDoU1PT6VNI0BlHXtg2g7ZkbHhm5N)
|
---
Donald Trump’s message of division and policy of chaos has put Republican majorities at risk. What we saw in the 12th District is playing out across the country, with Republican control of the House at risk, along with key governorships and other offices. More importantly, Trump’s actions are ripping our country apart, undermining the rule of law and other fundamental foundations of our freedom, and tearing apart an alliance which kept the peace and promoted freedom for 75 years.
**Governor Kasich has demonstrated a different, higher path that brings people together. Hear it in his own words:**
|
---
[ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2bb447c4beb243558631b14e7105334b&_e=bg7r4P-n94kzfeD2ZnKYNqgp7rWx_dmeOnuYeYIKm2m7D8DdLzqFVXH2_1S3Jt8pQb_NOEsdAxuz_He5ZrN9PbgVnptZB-cX54tvg4erIv2gsO8NUhaDC6oOSMu_6rwkzPmzZUE_mgerutcM4tVx_hY7WyQ05lrMEeG5TFPF2G7PZ-dI5K9kQcET-5g1YoNFBotUAJfmfyg2vtTl17gYSTlXdwFhQXr93-BXmE-X2vv3jVnX4azGGGW8VYo1w76OQVYUJ_4scdf8_odTTj4gdT2uuK0a-vURovviERwcMJ0%3D)
|
---
We know the Governor’s message is resonating because Trump has started lashing out at the Governor. For the first time, Trump attacked Governor Kasich on twitter trying to blame him for the closeness of the special election. And now he’s unleashed his paid political staff to attack the Governor.
**Why would they do this?** They are threatened by the Governor and know his message works. [The Governor’s approval rating is nine points higher than Trump’s in Ohio](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=2bb447c4beb243558631b14e7105334b&_e=bg7r4P-n94kzfeD2ZnKYNhpe_Hxso_z3IaZUBcLUcrNO6IUblHV6SnwTBm7lWYqwaM7X9D9bcZHA4rlx7bphsvOu2JugK2t0yZ6QCd3-UIoe0LhQYMlN_YL8jecYbW_WmDBUy3dlB1nZ5QEVNUA1Vjwgo0QmNMvlxuFdG7g0KxTWvApyVrKGHMLooC24CS3C0pPvbCqnziPmgzvVuISNdSu-JGn2sobb1XtFJi2NbyUCmLy9XZPFzVco9SGc-mwhoScN3jV6_cLG2cIQ7NxI26JC7EBjxl7gPmZ-RAZJY3s%3D). Governor Kasich’s appeal to swing voters and independents across the country is far superior to the President’s.
Polling has also shown Governor Kasich to be a threat to the Trump in New Hampshire and elsewhere. For this reason, the RNC is already taking steps to rig the Party’s nominating process in 2020.
You don’t do these things if you don’t feel threatened and vulnerable.
Governor Kasich is going to continue to push his positive message of solving problems and bringing people together. Now we know it’s working.

| | | With the list of President Trump's conflicts of interests growing, it's more important than ever that Americans finally have the truth about Trump's finances.

**[10,000 Signers Needed: Tell President Trump to release his tax returns!->](http://nm.martinheinrich.com/page/m/4b75b6b5/43d8135f/678cf0c5/51003395/1324205019/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHYVhKemRFNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01TVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZCUkVSU01pVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3MTAzIn0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ReleaseTrumpsTaxes/?code=heinrich&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmth-tax-returns%3Frefcode%3DMH_EM_PT_90DO_180817_1_1%26amount%3D10%26recurring%3D1?firstName=&lastName=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+10000+Signers+Needed+Tell+President+Trum&utm_campaign=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180817_1_1&source=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180817_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_PT_180DO_180817_1_1")**

* * *

President Trump is eroding many of the norms surrounding the presidency, but one of the most concerning is that he STILL has not released his tax returns.

**Every president since 1976 has released their tax returns so the American people can decide for themselves if his or her financial situation could compromise the presidency.**

body:
As we told you earlier this week, Democrat Joe Donnelly finally took the time to meet with our next U.S. Supreme Court justice, Judge Brett... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=23807d6033)
---

|
---
|
---
| **_Finally_** As we told you earlier this week, Democrat **Joe Donnelly** _finally_ took the time to meet with our next U.S. Supreme Court justice, **Judge Brett Kavanaugh** , after a month-long wait. The reason for the delay is simple - Democrat Donnelly is doing the bidding of his party boss, **Chuck Schumer,** just like he used to do the bidding of his former boss, **Nancy Pelosi**.

Schumer recently implored his fellow Democrats to delay meeting with Kavanaugh and to dodge when asked to take a position on the nomination. So, rather than do what Hoosiers want him to do (announce his immediate support), Democrat Donnelly is doing what Chuck Schumer wants him to do (drag his feet from here until confirmation).

This episode highlights what we've been repeating over and over again for a year-and-a-half now - Joe Donnelly is a Democrat. No matter what he tries to sell himself as, he is a Democrat yesterday, today and tomorrow. Let's not forget that. While he spends his time on the Indiana campaign trail telling Hoosiers he will always stand with us, that's not the case. From tax cuts to the Iran deal to Obamacare, Democrat Donnelly doesn't stand with Hoosiers, he stands with the far-left liberal leadership of his party in Washington, D.C.

He may not prove that in his well-tailored statements, but he proves it in his votes and in his actions. Polling shows that Hoosiers want to see Judge Kavanaugh, a highly-qualified jurist, confirmed to the U.S. Supreme Court. Now it's time for Democrat Donnelly to stop playing Chuck Schumer's D.C. games and make it clear in his words and his actions where he stands.

-Kyle
---
| |
---
| | **_Governor Holcomb's Week That Was_**
---
|
---
---
| **_Serving Up Fun and Serving Up Jobs_**
Governor **Eric Holcomb** spent another week on the road this week - serving up fun and serving up jobs. At the State Fair, he [served up delicious treats](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=5062a6a80b&e=1acd9bb3d6) to Hoosiers at the famous Dairy Barn, and up in Northwest Indiana, he served Hoosiers looking for a new job by helping [break ground at the Indiana NAP's Digital Crossroads Center](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1f61335771&e=1acd9bb3d6) in Hammond.

Like all of our responsible, Republican Hoosier leaders, Governor Holcomb is in-touch and on the move. He's connecting with Hoosiers from tip to tail and always working hard to take our state to the Next Level!
---
|
---
| | **_The Mike Braun Corner_**
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e6fe5280ab&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **_Braun Nabs Major Endorsement; Exposes Potential Donnelly Ethics Issue_**
While Democrat **Joe Donnelly** barred the media from filming his meeting with Judge **Brett Kavanaugh** on Wednesday, that didn't stop his official staff from [capturing footage and posting it online](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=48192eddfb&e=1acd9bb3d6) for his campaign to use. That's right, Democrat Donnelly is feeding his political boss, Chuck Schumer, and his Democrat pals with ethically-challenged video footage to show on Hoosier airwaves.

Thankfully, **Mike Braun** and his team are keeping a watchful eye on Democrat Donnelly and all his political games (see the lead section for more about that!)

But there's even bigger news for Hoosier sports fans - especially those who cheer on the Fighting Irish. Legendary coach **Lou Holtz** penned an op-ed in support of Mike Braun in the Fort Wayne _Journal Gazette_ this week. Be sure to [click here to check it out](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=ea4fc77d04&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
|
---
| **_Youngest Republican County Chair Elected in Union County_**
Congratulations to **Lavinia Brookshire** , the newest Union County Republican Chair and now the _youngest_ chair in the entire state! At age 24, she takes the baton from Miami County Chair **Ethan Manning** , who at 26, had been the youngest chair for the past 5 1/2 years.

As both Lavinia and Ethan can tell you, Hoosier Republicans (of all ages) know how to #LeadRight!
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| **_Scenes from the State Fair_**
There are still two days to go, but it's safe to say this has been a banner year for the Indiana Republican Party at the State Fair. Hundreds of Hoosiers have come to our booth to say hello, fill out voter surveys, register to vote and pick up fun Republican candidate swag. Thank you to Governor **Eric Holcomb** , Secretary of State **Connie Lawson** , Treasurer **Kelly Mitchell** , Auditor **Tera Klutz** , **Greg Pence** , State Rep. **Jim Baird** and the countless other elected officials, county chairs and volunteers from across the state who spent time at the booth. Until next year!

clean_body: As we told you earlier this week, Democrat Joe Donnelly finally took the time to meet with our next U.S. Supreme Court justice, Judge Brett... | | | | | | | | Finally As we told you earlier this week, Democrat Joe Donnelly finally took the time to meet with our next U.S. Supreme Court justice, Judge Brett Kavanaugh , after a month-long wait. The reason for the delay is simple - Democrat Donnelly is doing the bidding of his party boss, Chuck Schumer, just like he used to do the bidding of his former boss, Nancy Pelosi. Schumer recently implored his fellow Democrats to delay meeting with Kavanaugh and to dodge when asked to take a position on the nomination. So, rather than do what Hoosiers want him to do (announce his immediate support), Democrat Donnelly is doing what Chuck Schumer wants him to do (drag his feet from here until confirmation). This episode highlights what we've been repeating over and over again for a year-and-a-half now - Joe Donnelly is a Democrat. No matter what he tries to sell himself as, he is a Democrat yesterday, today and tomorrow. Let's not forget that. While he spends his time on the Indiana campaign trail telling Hoosiers he will always stand with us, that's not the case. From tax cuts to the Iran deal to Obamacare, Democrat Donnelly doesn't stand with Hoosiers, he stands with the far-left liberal leadership of his party in Washington, D.C. He may not prove that in his well-tailored statements, but he proves it in his votes and in his actions. Polling shows that Hoosiers want to see Judge Kavanaugh, a highly-qualified jurist, confirmed to the U.S. Supreme Court. Now it's time for Democrat Donnelly to stop playing Chuck Schumer's D.C. games and make it clear in his words and his actions where he stands. -Kyle | | | | Governor Holcomb's Week That Was | | Serving Up Fun and Serving Up Jobs Governor Eric Holcomb spent another week on the road this week - serving up fun and serving up jobs. At the State Fair, he to Hoosiers at the famous Dairy Barn, and up in Northwest Indiana, he served Hoosiers looking for a new job by helping in Hammond. Like all of our responsible, Republican Hoosier leaders, Governor Holcomb is in-touch and on the move. He's connecting with Hoosiers from tip to tail and always working hard to take our state to the Next Level! | | | The Mike Braun Corner | | Braun Nabs Major Endorsement; Exposes Potential Donnelly Ethics Issue While Democrat Joe Donnelly barred the media from filming his meeting with Judge Brett Kavanaugh on Wednesday, that didn't stop his official staff from for his campaign to use. That's right, Democrat Donnelly is feeding his political boss, Chuck Schumer, and his Democrat pals with ethically-challenged video footage to show on Hoosier airwaves. Thankfully, Mike Braun and his team are keeping a watchful eye on Democrat Donnelly and all his political games (see the lead section for more about that!) But there's even bigger news for Hoosier sports fans - especially those who cheer on the Fighting Irish. Legendary coach Lou Holtz penned an op-ed in support of Mike Braun in the Fort Wayne Journal Gazette this week. Be sure to . | | | Youngest Republican County Chair Elected in Union County Congratulations to Lavinia Brookshire , the newest Union County Republican Chair and now the youngest chair in the entire state! At age 24, she takes the baton from Miami County Chair Ethan Manning , who at 26, had been the youngest chair for the past 5 1/2 years. As both Lavinia and Ethan can tell you, Hoosier Republicans (of all ages) know how to #LeadRight! | | | | Scenes from the State Fair There are still two days to go, but it's safe to say this has been a banner year for the Indiana Republican Party at the State Fair. Hundreds of Hoosiers have come to our booth to say hello, fill out voter surveys, register to vote and pick up fun Republican candidate swag. Thank you to Governor Eric Holcomb , Secretary of State Connie Lawson , Treasurer Kelly Mitchell , Auditor Tera Klutz , Greg Pence , State Rep. Jim Baird and the countless other elected officials, county chairs and volunteers from across the state who spent time at the booth. subject: Georgia needs Stacey Abrams.

body:

| | | Friends - I know Stacey Abrams. Her heart and commitment to our state shine through her leadership and service. Furthermore, as a former governor of Georgia myself, I know that Stacey has the courage and ability to serve every Georgian well - no matter where they call home. After leaving the White House, I returned home to Plains, Georgia. Plains is a town of about 700 people - it has grown a lot since I was a child, and Georgia as a whole has changed quite a bit in my lifetime. As my favorite high school teacher, Miss Coleman, used to say, "We must accommodate changing times, but cling to unchanging principles." Stacey Abrams is the right leader for our changing state who has consistently championed the American values we share: equality for all, excellent public schools for our children, and an economy where families from Plains to Plainville and Pooler have the opportunity to get ahead. Stacey Abrams' experience, vision, and proven track record of building consensus across party lines are beyond compare, and I will work as hard as I can to elect her in November. With Stacey Abrams in the governor's mansion, our state will be in good hands and the Georgia of tomorrow will be bright. At a time when we desperately need more bold leadership at all levels of government, I am proud to support Stacey Abrams' gubernatorial campaign in this historic race. President Jimmy Carter
39th President of the United States
76th Governor of Georgia

Friend, did you see my note this week?

If not, here’s the quick version.

On Tuesday, we became national targets when we won the Republican nomination to take on Tammy Baldwin this November.

To me, that is an incredible honor! Because let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin does not represent our Wisconsin values and WE DESERVE BETTER.

I know that if we come together now, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin the same way we won on Tuesday. With grassroots supporters like you!

I’m asking everyone to join me on this next step of the campaign by chipping in just $25: **[https://secure.anedot.com/leah/donate/](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0d38a8c8a3114820b76fca9a3c99c0c8&_e=SVkuYEAIvU19jnHdqulqWVrkTLx9eW5-kHVk_i360EDXs_iYZlsQlcAaSGrXfOOYivGFxoy-irRC5vFexjxL2hmzVn-8aghUc0hj26yPT2wY5O64u-RxD8mHFUVMF0NDY-EQZY974RukVgqdVM_eS5X8KQjxqgoybRvQTOlh4mtns6Q8LbPSTsGik1B8nvgxfY9JgcyBTt9NMryN6WlQHay_VZU0yUhJcpp8TfknEWIan-n9tdAGI0VinS3A2zk6_wVeKHfcC6xHWEL_kRo-HEpu1xVO-siC8a_86J41ef6O0bK4mc8W3qJ2VXXfewPdrXt-CzDFzN8ZORLm3v76h_LwIsJhNp3xjCgFzm0kN1JZWoBFZtS04Ja-TVtqB-HVe5b9sozV-Xpzi4bCbDSn7C6XYACJwWvZQmcqYYmtHkiigqUqG3eSFdhUPABqMkgQ)**

Friend, when we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy.

We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics...

And throughout it all, we delivered our conservative message all across the state.

In May, we won at convention. But on Tuesday, we won at the polls.

And friend, I want to say THANK YOU for everything you did to make it happen.

We fought hard, we fought honorably for a good mission, and we proved that the America First, grassroots conservative movement is alive and well. And we're coming for Senator Baldwin!

clean_body: On Tuesday, we became national targets when we won the Republican nomination to take on Tammy Baldwin this November. To me, that is an incredible.... Friend, did you see my note this week? If not, here’s the quick version. On Tuesday, we became national targets when we won the Republican nomination to take on Tammy Baldwin this November. To me, that is an incredible honor! Because let's just face it, Tammy Baldwin does not represent our Wisconsin values and WE DESERVE BETTER. I know that if we come together now, we can defeat Tammy Baldwin the same way we won on Tuesday. With grassroots supporters like you! I’m asking everyone to join me on this next step of the campaign by chipping in just $25: Can you step up today? Thanks, friend. And read my note below if you get a chance! -Leah \----------- Forwarded Message Below ----------- Friend, when we started this race we knew it wouldn't be easy. We had to take on the naysayers, the out-of-state mega donors, and swamp tactics... And throughout it all, we delivered our conservative message all across the state. In May, we won at convention. But on Tuesday, we won at the polls. And friend, I want to say THANK YOU for everything you did to make it happen. We fought hard, we fought honorably for a good mission, and we proved that the America First, grassroots conservative movement is alive and well. And we're coming for Senator Baldwin! Our race is really just getting started. Liberals know we stand in the way of their hope of controlling the Senate. They will make me their number one target as we get closer to election day. But friend, I’m ready. And I’m hoping you’ll stand by my side through this fight to help me deliver the Wisconsin Way in DC. But here’s the thing: I really need your support as we continue. I’m setting a goal of raising $50,000 this week to kick off our OFFICIAL general election campaign, and I’m hoping you’ll become one of my first supporters of this part of our campaign. Friend, let’s make sure we continue to be bold, we continue to make our voices heard, and we stay vigilant in our goal to end Washington dysfunction. I know we can do it, as long as we work together. Please, chip in now: Thanks in advance, friend. Leah Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: 538 looked at "hundreds of endorsements"...but not all of ours
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
I do not recall any revolution in history that was smooth, let alone easy.
#
Friends,
I do not recall any revolution in history that was smooth, let alone easy. The path of our political revolution traverses the mountains of the Rockies, winds through the deserts of Northern Nevada, and twists through the cities of the eastern seaboard.
But make no mistake, the political revolution is gaining momentum. From Kansas to the Bronx, from Maryland to Northern California, we are winning. Those who doubt the strength of our movement use metrics that simply cannot measure the courage of you, the people. Pollsters in D.C. look at the governor's race in Michigan and chalk it up to a loss. But they weren't with me and Senator Bernie Sanders in Detroit and they weren't with me at grassroots meetings held in backyards across Ypsilanti.
For those who seek to discount the power of working people coming together, for those who seek to dismiss the courage of first-time candidates refusing corporate contributions to their grassroots campaigns, for those who seek out the obstacles in our path and point out our stumbles, we have news for you:
We will not be discouraged by your doubt. We will not give in it to your shallow outlooks on wins and losses. We will not stop. Because you cannot measure grassroots momentum with grasstops statistics.
**Our movement for a political revolution is constantly being underestimated by mainstream institutions.** They don't want to see what we know; out of the 153 elections this year where Our Revolution has endorsed a candidate, that candidate has prevailed _48% of the time_. Let's put that number in perspective: In the 2016 primary, the mainstream media predicted that our movement wouldn't generate more than 5% of the vote. They were wrong. Just two years later, we are remaking the political landscape.
**[Can you pitch in $5 so that we can keep winning races locally, statewide, and send more progressives to Congress?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9b9/bed43eb/7ca4d118/75fc8de6/2949516628/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180817")**
The next few weeks and months are critical. We have over 100 candidates running for office between now and Election Day. Some candidates you may have heard of before, like **Ben Jealous for governor of Maryland, Stacey Abrams for governor of Georgia, and Paulette Jordan for governor of Idaho.** But we also have dozens of local and state legislative candidates who are fighting for progressive issues directly in their neighborhoods that need our support. Jovanka Beckles in California, Summer Lee in Pennsylvania, Gabriel Acevero in Maryland and more are counting on us.
**[This is Our Revolution's vision for all of us, working together from the bottom up, to win the policies that meet the needs of ALL people. Can you chip in $5 to help us get there?](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a9b9/bed43eb/7ca4d118/75fc8de6/2949516628/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/august-candidates?refcode=em180817")**
We have an inspiring slate of candidates - many running for the very first time - who are counting on our support as they challenge the status quo with people like you by their side. Thank you for being a part of our work.
We. Are. Winning!
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

But we also have dozens of local and state legislative candidates who are fighting for progressive issues directly in their neighborhoods that need our support. Jovanka Beckles in California, Summer Lee in Pennsylvania, Gabriel Acevero in Maryland and more are counting on us. "" We have an inspiring slate of candidates - many running for the very first time - who are counting on our support as they challenge the status quo with people like you by their side. Thank you for being a part of our work. We. Are. Winning! In solidarity, Nina Turner President Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. name: Jay Inslee
subject: A better approach [climate change]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clean Air Clean Energy WA
body:
We have to act on climate. Add your name to support I-1631 today!

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78739/2f5ea88d/7689dbf6/2cbc285f/301301929/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-yes-on-1631?utm_source=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&refcode=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&utm_campaign=inslee-for-1631&utm_medium=ema") Friend, The Trump administration and their oil allies have done everything in their power to wreak havoc on our health and environment. The EPA has become little more than a tool for the coal and oil industry to push their anti-environment agenda. They've even appointed Andrew Wheeler, a former coal lobbyist, to head the agency. So you better believe that here in Washington state, we're going to chart a better path forward for our state and, ultimately, our country. [**A big part of our plan to make Washington state lead the fight against climate change is Ballot Initiative 1631. In a minute, I'll tell you more about I-1631 -- I hope you'll join me in showing your support for this bold initiative.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78739/2f5ea88d/7689dbf6/2cbc285f/301301929/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-yes-on-1631?utm_source=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&refcode=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&utm_campaign=inslee-for-1631&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78739/2f5ea88d/7689dbf6/2cbc285f/301301929/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-yes-on-1631?utm_source=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&refcode=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&utm_campaign=inslee-for-1631&utm_medium=ema")
---
**Let me tell you about why I'm supporting Yes on 1631.** I want clean air and clean water for my grandchildren. I want to make sure polluters are paying their fair share and taking responsibility for their actions that harm our health. And I want us to have the strength to fight back against the oil and coal industry.
Washington state has never been afraid to lead, but this administration has just upped the urgency. We can't wait for the other Washington to act -- we can take a practical first step right here.
By taking on the big polluters, we can respond to the economic needs of every community, not just one. Here's what it will do:
* I-1631 provides huge benefits for public health by reducing pollution and improving air quality, keeping our state healthy for future generations.
* Passing I-1631 ensures businesses can access new technology to make clean energy more affordable for more people.
* I-1631 eases the burden of pollution by giving commuters new ways of getting to and from work.
* Importantly, I-1631 will create 41,000 new good paying jobs in communities across the state.

**Friend, if you're mad about oil companies trying to tell us what to do in our own state and Donald Trump yanking us out of the Paris Agreement, remember one thing: They can't stop you voting for this initiative. It's a moment of great responsibility and opportunity, and nobody can stop us.**
[**I'm supporting I-1631 and I hope you will join me. Can you chip in now to help them win?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78739/2f5ea88d/7689dbf6/2cbc285f/301301929/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-yes-on-1631?utm_source=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&refcode=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&utm_campaign=inslee-for-1631&utm_medium=ema")
Together, we can change the future of our state -- and our planet.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78739/2f5ea88d/7689dbf6/2cbc285f/301301929/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-yes-on-1631?utm_source=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&refcode=ema_2018-08-16_inslee-for-1631&utm_campaign=inslee-for-1631&utm_medium=ema")

Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.

For 83 years, working people across the country have paid into this system with the promise that they can collect this earned benefit when they decide to retire. [**In honor of this important date, will you voice your support for Social Security?**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fec/1a8421e1/1a57cb8ec/48c83ee4/2667529778/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/ss-birthday?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307") | ****[Sign on>>](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fec/1a8421e1/1a57cb8ec/48c83ee4/2667529778/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/ss-birthday?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")****

[**Help us celebrate Social Security 's 83rd birthday by signing onto our petition here.**](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d633fec/1a8421e1/1a57cb8ec/48c83ee4/2667529778/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6Ijg1MzA3In0=/ "http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/s/ss-birthday?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=85307")

Thanks,
Team O'Halleran
